chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-684 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh case 1.For orders on CMA 3103/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 3104/25 4.For hearing of main case 16-05-2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Through this petition, the petitioner is seeking directions to respondents (Revenue Officials) to maintain the entry in his name in the record-of-rights on the basis of sale deed dated 09.05.2024, as he is legal and lawful owner of the same property, details of which are mentioned in para-2 of memo of the petition. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G present in Court in connection with other matters waives notice and submits that the Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No.DD(E&I)-HQ/BOR/2024/302, dated 21.10.2024 has established a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. This Cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this Cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” as prescribed by the Notification. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
